questionHtml:
In a natural gas power station, 1.00 tonne of natural gas produces 2.41 × 104 MJ of electricity.

Calculate the percentage efficiency of the power station.

1 tonne = 1000 kg
Specific energy of natural gas used = 55.4 MJ kg−1
markschemeHtml:
«energy input =» 5.54 ×104 «MJ» ✔
«efficiency = 2.41×104 MJ5.54×104 MJ×100=» 43.5 «%» ✔

NOTE: Award [2] for correct final answer.

meta.title: In a natural gas power station, 1.00 tonne of natural gas produces 2.41 × 104 MJ of electricity. Calculate the percentage efficiency of the power station. 1 tonne = 1000 kgSpecific
